nasb.text: Then the priest shall wave them for a wave offering before the Lord. It is holy for the priest, together with the breast offered by waving and the thigh offered by lifting up; and afterward the Nazirite may drink wine.’

esv.text: and the priest shall wave them for a wave offering before the Lord. They are a holy portion for the priest, together with the breast that is waved and the thigh that is contributed. And after that the Nazirite may drink wine.

cnv.text: 祭司要把這些作為搖祭，在耶和華面前搖一搖；這些和作搖祭獻上的胸和作舉祭的腿，同為聖物歸給祭司；然後拿細耳人才可以喝酒。

ccb.text: 然后，祭司要把这些祭物作为摇祭在耶和华面前摇一摇。这些祭物与作摇祭的胸肉和作举祭的腿肉一样，都是归给祭司的圣物。此后，拿细耳人便可以喝酒。
